title: Data Structures in a University Press Publishing Workflow
description: A visual representation of how core data structures are applied in the key processes of a university press, from manuscript acquisition to book distribution.
relationships: Manuscripts are processed in a FIFO Queue for initial review
Reviewers and manuscripts form a Graph network for peer review
The book catalog is organized in a Tree hierarchy for browsing
Inventory is stored and accessed via a Hash Table for speed
Customer orders are packed and shipped in a LIFO Stack-based system
